feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 201,820Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 358

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Gotham Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: mnisesa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,927Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 1

Summary: Gotham is a dangerous place. After Jeremy gets out of prison, many things go wrong in the city, forcing heroes and villains to work together to resolve the chaos caused by a murder.

entry.title: Cycle
entry.summary:
Author: Oat8889

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,697Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Reverse Robins, where Damian is the oldest, and Dick is the youngest, and I am very particular about how each character is and care a lot about how Stephanie is written, and I don't know how to write a summary. If this gets views, I'll actually try.

entry.title: The lost Bat
entry.summary:
Author: Batfam_fanatic

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,771Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 6

Summary: !!! TW: TRAFFICKING!!!Before Damian Al Ghul-Wayne, Bruce had another biological child: Luke Wayne, born from a one night stand during his playboy billionaire era.Little did he know, the woman he had slept with, was a meta, and Luke inherited the gene.He realized that too late, and one day, Luke disappeared.Will Bruce ever see his son again?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Not-So-Solitary
entry.summary:
Author: girlbrainiac

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,916Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 268

Summary: After a mis-aimed batarang throw, Batman managed to hold onto the Red Hood in the subsequent explosion. Fearing that he could lose his son again, Bruce keeps Jason locked in the Bat Cave. Jason is exactly where he never wanted to be: stuck in a glass case amidst a colony of Bats he swore he wanted nothing to do with ever again. More annoying than that, though, they refuse to leave him alone or stop talking to him. Sheesh. Now he almost wished they'd sent him to Arkham. ...Almost.

entry.title: Our Monkey, Our Circus
entry.summary:
Author: gardenfire45

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,365Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 27

Summary: Alfred wants the Batfamily to get along It end up as we all expected, Chaos... At least it's entertaining... Stephanie: I can't believe I'm being a third wheel rnStephanie: I thought you guys are over??? Jason: Same Steph... Same Dick: we're not dating anymore but it doesn't mean we can't be nice to each other

entry.title: Never Have I Ever
entry.summary:
Author: MoonlitMiffy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,392Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 7

Summary: Cass moves into the Family Wing.Her new life began the moment she stepped into her very own bedroom. She made it four steps in before her new little brother's dragged her out of it.The room can wait, the grand tour of the manor could not (or didn't want to).

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,872Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 244

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.title: The Bat’s Tailor
entry.summary:
Author: Batfam_fanatic

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,460Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Bruce felt like he never had time for love. Between his family, his duty as Batman and keeping up appearances as Bruce Wayne, he didn’t know how to fit it into his schedule.Then he found love in one of the places he despises the most:A gala.When a famous fashion designer by the name of Darius Williams catches his eye, his view on love gets turned upside down.

entry.title: Gotham’s personal devil.
entry.summary:
Author: Agentph03n1x

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,778Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 619

Summary: The day started off like any usual day in the hotel, ghosts huddled around the TV chatting obnoxiously loud, Ester practicing her dark magic, Ben trying to boost his ego and failing in doing so, Nathan trying to work the front desk but scaring off potential customers when his hand goes through keys instead of grabbing them. The same old normal they have become so used to after living in the hotel for so long. However, Abaddon had bigger plans in mind today, yes today on this faithful day, Abaddon was finally going to capture the Moth-man, his arch nemesis since the dawn of time.

entry.title: A Nest Built In The Shadows
entry.summary:
Author: StrangeBlayke

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Wings mark the rare, the hunted, and the misunderstood. In Gotham, they are dangerous to have—and nearly all of the Batfamily are Avian. Bruce Wayne’s Manor is more than a home; it is a nest, a place where his adopted children can learn to fly, fight, and survive. But even in the shadows, Gotham will not let them rest quietly. Or: I read an Avian AU fanfic with a different fandom and decided I had to do one with the BatFam!

entry.title: Entering The World
entry.summary:
Author: redrose_writes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,927Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 8

Summary: Things have never been easy when it comes to Bruce Wayne. Nobody knows that better than Dick Grayson. But, in the aftermath of his return from traveling in time, Bruce is spiraling and he's taking the entire family down with him. And maybe Dick could handle being dragged down, but he refuses to let his family go down with Bruce's forever doomed ship. Maybe, just maybe, his own breaking is just what the family needed to finally feel Bruce's hold on them loosen.

Author: aineran

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,377Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 67

entry.title: Lights! Cameras! And ACTION!
entry.summary:
Author: Fishwithabow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,859Chapters: 13/25Kudos: 143

Summary: You are Bruce’s Wayne only BLOOD daughter. He adopted you when you were nine following your mother’s sudden death. Your mother used to be a well known actor and so of course, like mother like daughter, you too wanted to be an actor. Your father and your new siblings for some reason tend to forget about you and end up leaving you in their dust. Will that ever change? Will you become famous before they ever notice you? Or will something happen that will change your whole view of your life? CURRENTLY REVISING STORY!! NO NEW CHAPTERS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE!!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Reason to Live
entry.summary:
Author: Mina-Sanno (DarkVincentFantasy)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 939Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: | “Dad...! dad please, let me stay and fight!” | "I'm sorry, Austin." | Numb.   He spent years hopping from Earth to Earth, killing Jokers and Lex Luthors and anyone else who posed a threat. He had been thrown from his own universe by his father in an attempt to save him. Sacrificing his own life in the process. Maybe a part of him resented his father for it, maybe not. But Austin Wayne has spent 6 years wandering in a practically comatose state, a dead man walking some would say. Then, on his 12th universal hop, he ends up on Prime. Deciding to just...pause in his hunt for a while, Austin as Black Bird stalks this version of his family. Just to keep an eye on them, just to...just to see them again. That's all.   | For the first time in a long, long time, Austin feels a pang in his chest. Maybe it was worry, maybe it was jealousy or just an old painful pang from days long past.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,134Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.
